diagnostics.title: Exact duplicate vertices merged
diagnostics.message: Coincident STL vertices were indexed as shared vertices.

diagnostics.title: Non-manifold vertices
diagnostics.message: At least one vertex does not have a single disk-like surface neighborhood.

diagnostics.title: Bowtie vertex neighborhoods
diagnostics.message: Disconnected surface fans touch only at a vertex.

diagnostics.title: Disconnected surface components
diagnostics.message: Strict imported-domain mode currently requires one connected closed shell.

diagnostics.title: Multiple closed shells
diagnostics.message: Multi-shell containment semantics are not enabled in this milestone.

diagnostics.title: Self-intersecting surface
diagnostics.message: Non-adjacent triangle crossings prevent the mesh from acting as a reliable signed boundary.

diagnostics.title: Coplanar triangle overlap
diagnostics.message: Non-adjacent coplanar faces overlap geometrically.

diagnostics.title: Intersecting components
diagnostics.message: Disconnected shells cross or overlap in space.

diagnostics.title: Component contact or overlap
diagnostics.message: Component boundaries are not spatially independent.

diagnostics.title: Mesh feature indicator below one voxel

diagnostics.title: Thin-wall risk unresolved

diagnostics.title: Low SDF resolution confidence
diagnostics.message: Increase resolution to test whether fine components and channels persist; resolution was not changed automatically.

diagnostics.title: Boundary aliasing risk high
diagnostics.message: Tessellation-derived feature indicators are too close to the voxel spacing for a strong boundary claim.
